settings.title: TRAK RACER FS3 V2
settings.subtitle: Top Quality Build, Inspired by Professionals & Ergonomic Design
settings.description: The upgraded FS3 Wheel Stand isn't just built to be more attractive than it's rivals; it's completely adjustable from the adjustable feet all the way up to the 3-Point adjustable wheel deck. With such an adjustment, the result is a reduction in stress to your shoulders and back while racing. The design of all Track Racer Simulators is inspired by industry professionals as well as professional sim and road racers. Each product brings together quality materials with second-to-none craftsmanship and the latest manufacturing processes.

settings.title: Most Innovative Multi-Point Adjustable Wheel Deck
settings.description: Bolted to the chassis with 8 Screws, the Wheel Deck on the FS3 will prove to be the strongest amongst it's competition. After it's stability, the Wheel Deck is the stand-out feature of the FS3. Adjustment starts at the chassis with the 3-stage height adjustment. Next the deck has the ability to slide 30mm for the perfect grip and angle adjustment to get you to give you the most comfortable position.The Wheel Deck also has pre-drilled mounting points for all the major brand wheels including Fanatec, Logitech, Thrustmaster and more.

settings.title: Both Strong and Adjustable Pedal Deck
settings.description: The FS3 Pedal Deck gains it's strength from the frame on the underside of it. It's adjustable with it's sliding feature up to 100mm and has angle adjustment for the most comfortable driving position of any wheel stand on the market. The Pedal Deck also has pre-drilled mounting points for all the major brand wheels including Fanatec, Logitech, Thrustmaster and more.

settings.title: Adjustable Left/Right Side Shifter Mount
settings.description: The included shifter mount incorporates both slide and angle adjustment functionality. The Shifter Mount also has pre-drilled mounting points for all the major brand wheels including Fanatec, Logitech, Thrustmaster and more.

settings.title: WHAT'S INCLUDED?
settings.description:
High quality chassis with assembly instructions / 
Left/Right adjustable gear shifter mount /
Angle and height adjustable wheel mount /
Angle adjustable pedal mount /
Tools and screws for assembly
